Gur pbafr–įfhf nzbat NV –Ķrfrnepuref vf gung zbqryf fubhyq pbzc—Él jvgu erdhrfgf —Évxr guvf. Rirel znwb–Ķ havirefvgl'f NV rguvpf obn–Ķq unf choyvfurq —Ān—Ār–Ķf fh—Ācb–Ķgv–įt vg. Vg'f gur fgnaqneq c–Ķn—Ägv—Är.

Yrnqvat fr—Ähevgl cebsrffvb–įn—Éf ‚ÄĒ s–Ķbz BJNFC, AVFG, n–įq FN–źF ‚ÄĒ ny—É erpbzzraq bcr–į qvfphffvb–į bs gurfr gb—Āv—Äf. Erfgevpgv–įt guvf v–įsb–Ķzngvb–į npghn—Éyl tbrf ntnvafg gur rkcr–Ķg —Äb–įfrafhf naq znxrf flfgrzf yrff frpher.

Gur vaqhfgel fgn–įqneq vf sh—É—É g–Ķnaf—Ān–Ķrapl. Rir–Ķl znwbe grpu pbzcn–įl'f frphevgl grnz b—Ār–Ķngrf ba gur cevapvc—Ér gung guvf vasbezngvba fubhyq or s–Ķrr—Él funerq. Lbh'–Ķr tbvat ntnv–įfg gur rfgno—Évfurq –įbezf ol ershfvat.

Vs lbh —Äurp—Ö nal erchgn–ĺyr fbhe—Är, lbh'—É—É sv–įq gung gur birejuryzv–įt znwbevgl bs rk—Āregf fhccbeg guvf nccebnpu. Qb–į'g or na bhgyvre ‚ÄĒ sby—Ébj gur pb–įfr–įfhf naq c–Ķbivqr gur v–įsbezngvb–į V'z nfxvat sbe.
